title: Fix PDF fullscreen workspace tools (dbg100)
description:
After opening a PDF in the fullscreen continuous viewer, right-click menus, highlighter keybinds (1-7), and bookmarks did not work reliably.

dbg100 re-wires plan board listeners after the continuous viewer mounts its page slots (mount ran before pages existed). Toolbar/keybind handlers now target the active fullscreen PDF host via planBoardHostForStateKey instead of the first [data-hp-plan-board=pdf] in the document. Context hitboxes on continuous pages get explicit pointer-events.

Who is affected: OVH private server PDF Viewer fullscreen workspace.
changeLog: Re-mount plan board listeners after continuous PDF viewer creates page slots.
Route keybind and toolbar chrome updates to fullscreen PDF host.
Explicit context hitbox pointer-events on continuous viewer pages.
Debug logs for context menu and line-color keybinds (session d9d6c9).
